executive_summary: Child idx 0 (dependency root) of the Brainstorm Distillation Pipeline orchestrator. Builds the chairman review-queue substrate: an additive, reversible schema migration on eva_consultant_recommendations plus a queue writer that records a distilled brainstorm candidate as a chairman-reviewable recommendation row referencing its source wave item. This is built FIRST so the downstream disposition-gate child (FK-to-accepted-recommendation check) and the distiller child (distilled_sd_payload write) both have a target. LEAD validation (evidence f76df3e9-8094-4968-b3be-8cd820b9108d, confidence 92) confirmed: confidence_tier ALREADY exists (text) so the migration only genuinely adds source_wave_item_id (uuid FK -> roadmap_wave_items(id) ON DELETE SET NULL) + distilled_sd_payload (jsonb) + an index; roadmap_wave_items.id is uuid; the queue writer must reuse the existing lib/eva/consultant/* insert shape and populate the NOT NULL columns (recommendation_type, title, action_type, status, recommendation_date). Prod-apply of the additive DDL is the governed delegation path (database-agent/Adam) — this child SHIPS the migration file + tests as the artifact and does NOT self-apply against prod.

functional_requirements.title: Additive distillation-queue migration on eva_consultant_recommendations
functional_requirements.description: database/migrations/20260623_eva_consultant_recommendations_distillation_queue.sql: ALTER TABLE eva_consultant_recommendations ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source_wave_item_id uuid REFERENCES roadmap_wave_items(id) ON DELETE SET NULL; ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS distilled_sd_payload jsonb; ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS confidence_tier text (idempotent no-op — already exists); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_eva_consultant_recommendations_source_wave_item_id ON eva_consultant_recommendations(source_wave_item_id). House style: SD-ID header comment marking ADDITIVE + NULLABLE + REVERSIBLE/idempotent; COMMENT ON COLUMN citing the SD-ID; trailing rollback comment. No drops/renames.
acceptance_criteria: Migration is purely additive (ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS + CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS); no drops/renames
source_wave_item_id is uuid FK -> roadmap_wave_items(id) ON DELETE SET NULL; distilled_sd_payload is jsonb
Idempotent (re-runnable) and reversible (rollback comment present); SD-ID cited in header + COMMENT ON COLUMN

functional_requirements.title: Chairman review-queue writer
functional_requirements.description: A writer (lib/eva/consultant/ module) that records a distilled brainstorm candidate as a chairman-reviewable eva_consultant_recommendations row: sets source_wave_item_id (the originating roadmap_wave_items.id), distilled_sd_payload (the distilled SD JSON), confidence_tier, and the NOT NULL columns with engine-consistent defaults (status='pending', action_type='create_sd', recommendation_type='strategic', title from the distilled payload, recommendation_date defaulted). Reuses the existing recommendation insert shape (lib/eva/consultant/* / scripts/eva/recommendation-engine.mjs) rather than a bespoke insert. Pure/injectable client so it is unit-testable.
acceptance_criteria: Writer inserts a recommendation row with source_wave_item_id, distilled_sd_payload, confidence_tier populated
All NOT NULL columns populated with engine-consistent defaults; reuses the existing insert shape
Client is injectable so the writer is unit-testable without a live DB

functional_requirements.title: Write/read unit tests
functional_requirements.description: tests/unit covering the queue writer: builds the correct row from a distilled candidate (field mapping + defaults), handles a missing/optional confidence_tier, and surfaces an insert error rather than swallowing it. Use a fake/injected supabase client (no live DB).
acceptance_criteria: Test: writer maps a distilled candidate to the correct recommendation row (source_wave_item_id, distilled_sd_payload, defaults)
Test: insert error is surfaced, not swallowed

technical_requirements.requirement: source_wave_item_id MUST be uuid (roadmap_wave_items.id is uuid); int/text breaks the FK
confidence_tier already exists (text) — ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is a safe no-op, not a genuinely new column
Worker ships the migration file + tests as the artifact; prod-apply of additive DDL is the governed database-agent/Adam delegation path (no worker self-apply against prod)
Reuse the existing eva_consultant_recommendations insert shape (lib/eva/consultant/*); populate NOT NULL cols recommendation_type/title/action_type/status/recommendation_date

test_scenarios.expected: source_wave_item_id, distilled_sd_payload, confidence_tier, and NOT NULL defaults all set correctly
writer still produces a valid row (tier optional/defaulted)
error surfaced to caller, not swallowed
re-running ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is a no-op (verified by statement form)

acceptance_criteria: Additive reversible migration file present and idempotent
Queue writer records a chairman-reviewable recommendation row referencing the source wave item
Unit tests green; no prod self-apply

risks.risk: Wrong FK type breaks the constraint
risks.mitigation: source_wave_item_id typed uuid to match roadmap_wave_items.id (verified uuid)

risks.risk: Missing a NOT NULL column at insert
risks.mitigation: Writer populates recommendation_type/title/action_type/status/recommendation_date with engine-consistent defaults; unit test asserts the full row

risks.risk: Accidental prod DDL apply from a worker
risks.mitigation: Ship the migration file as the artifact only; prod-apply delegated to database-agent/Adam

consumers: downstream distiller child (writes distilled_sd_payload via this writer)
data_contracts: Additive only: eva_consultant_recommendations gains source_wave_item_id (uuid FK), distilled_sd_payload (jsonb); confidence_tier already present; index on source_wave_item_id. No drops/renames.
observability_rollout: distilled candidates become chairman-reviewable rows linked to their source wave item

system_architecture.summary: One additive migration file + one queue-writer module reusing the existing recommendation insert shape + unit tests. No new component beyond the writer; no schema drops.

components.name: lib/eva/consultant queue writer
components.change: record a distilled candidate as a chairman-reviewable recommendation row

implementation_approach.summary: Author the additive migration, build the injectable queue writer reusing the existing insert shape, add unit tests with a fake client. Do not self-apply prod DDL.
steps: Write the additive, idempotent, reversible migration file (house style + SD-ID comments)
Build the queue writer (injectable client) reusing lib/eva/consultant insert shape; populate NOT NULL defaults
Add write/read unit tests with a fake supabase client
Run the unit suite (green); leave prod-apply to the governed delegation path

smoke_test_steps.instruction: npx vitest run the new queue-writer test file

smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: only ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS + CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS; uuid FK ON DELETE SET NULL; rollback comment present

metadata.fk_type: uuid -> roadmap_wave_items(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
